query:
SELECT 
  o.id,
  o.slug,
  o.name,
  o.status,
  c.name as partner_name,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE organizationId = o.id) as user_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM responses WHERE organizationId = o.id) as response_count
FROM organizations o
LEFT JOIN clients c ON o.clientId = c.id
ORDER BY o.name;
